info.title: csvtrans
info.description: Tool for building translations from Google Sheet.

options.name: --sheet
options.description: specify a Google Sheet as input.

options.name: --csv
options.description: specify a online or local cvs file as input.

options.name: --name
options.description: specify an optional name for the output.

options.name: --convert-placeholders
options.description: convert placeholders to match the output format.
